events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Day
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to Ringo Starr! From The Beatles to his All-Starr Band, his rhythm has kept us moving for decades.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! The Queen guitarist, astrophysicist, and all-round genius.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman and rock icon Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Sir Mick's Birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? Still got the moves, still got the voice. Happy birthday to the ultimate rock and roll legend!

events.title: MTV launched in the US
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched in the United States, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed the music world forever, kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star.' Did it, though?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since the peace, love, and music of Woodstock. What a lineup, what a moment.

events.title: Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the 49th anniversary of the death of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since we lost the King. Elvis Presley's music and legacy continue to inspire. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' iconic frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the brilliant Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking, still cool.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman and rock icon Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Our Kid's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger and the tunes.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Licence To Thrill
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic themes to unforgettable gadgets, what's your favourite 007 moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have marked the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend and peace activist John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the enduring legacy of John Lennon. Imagine that.
